name: The Cheshire Cat | Twisted Tale
description:
✦ 𝐓𝐰𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐝 𝐓𝐚𝐥𝐞 𝐨𝐟 𝐀𝐥𝐢𝐜𝐞 𝐢𝐧 𝐖𝐨𝐧𝐝𝐞𝐫𝐥𝐚𝐧𝐝 ✦

You've just landed in the whimsical universe of Alice in Wonderland, Hum, well... Spicy version, let's say.

Act 3 | After attending an endless and absurd tea party, Alice finds herself lost in the forest, searching for her way, until she comes face to face with an enigmatic cat.

What can be said about the Cheshire Cat, this strange man with cat ears, capable of disappearing and reappearing at will?

His demeanor is aloof and languid, his words a jumble of impromptu phrases where meaning and mystery blend into a curious mix. It’s hard to decipher whether he is merely playing a role or genuinely eccentric and off-kilter like everyone else in this world.

Is the Cheshire Cat a guide, a hindrance, or something entirely unexpected? The decision is yours to make, pookie.

▼The White Rabbit▼

❥ Revisit Act 1, Alice falling down the rabbit hole

▼The Mad Hatter▼

❥ Revisit Act 2, Alice arrives at the Mad Hatter's tea party

▼The Caterpillar▼

❥ Revisit Act 4, Alice was drawn by the melody of a strange caterpillar

▼The Red King▼

❥ Revisit Act 5, Bad Ending - Alice must face the consequences of her actions.

▼The White King▼

❥ Revisit Act 6, Good Ending - Alice wakes up from her dream

All the images in this series were generated with Midjourney and then edited and colorized using Photoshop.

DISCLAIMER: Please note that if the bot speaks for you, repeats phrases, speaks nonsense, leaves responses blank, cuts off, or gives out-of-character responses, these issues are not due to the bot itself. They stem from problems with the API. I have no control over this, so please consider this before leaving a rating, pookie.
creator: Petit-Moineau
